description: Ward, Agent 33, and Bakshi meet following Bakshi's extraction. Ward welcomes Bakshi to their fold and encourages Agent 33, hinting at a new and dangerous alliance. The trio prepares to move forward with their mysterious plans, closing the episode on a suspenseful note.

transcript.line: Nice to finally meet you. I'm Grant.
You did this. And it is just the beginning.
Guess we should get started, then. You really think this'll work?
If I obey, will my compliance be rewarded?
